scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & PID=$!; until curl -s http://localhost:8080/health > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.5; done; npm run dev:frontend; wait $PID
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd .. && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r api/requirements.txt
